company_name: 公益社団法人北海道シルバー人材センター連合会
hunter_likelihood_reason: Silver HR center providing temporary/part-time work for seniors; not a headhunter. MHLW confirms job seekers limited to elderly doing light/short-term work.
notes: Official site confirmed at webc.sjc.ne.jp/doushiren/ with matching company name and Sapporo HQ phone. Contact page has a web inquiry form only; no public email found. Company is a public-interest foundation for senior employment (part-time/temp staffing), not a headhunter.
